title: Lab Compounder / Lab Analyst #HAC
description:
Job Scope:

• Perform accurate compounding of flavor according to formula.

• Produce lab-scale batch for savoury process flavor. Operate, maintain, calibrate and sterilize laboratory equipment and work areas.

• Perform standard laboratory tests according to prescribed procedures and record the test results.

• Follow safety guidelines and standard operating procedures when handling raw materials and chemicals.

• Pack, label and prepare sample for QC and outgoing.

• Coordinate with the Flavorist and Quality Control Department and ensure compounded samples meet the standard.

• Monitor, review and replenishment of raw materials when inventory is low in the laboratory.

• Ensure raw materials used in the laboratory are stored in the correct condition and location to ensure quality and safety.

• Review and ensure optimal inventory level of library flavors.

• Maintain good housekeeping and a clean and safe working environment in the laboratory.

• Clean lab equipment, washing of glassware and apparatus after use.

• To carry out any additional job-related duties that may be assigned from time to time

Requirements:

• Min Diploma in food science related fields
• Able to start within a short notice period

Interested candidates please send your resume to anna.chen@recruitexpress.com.sg

Anna Chen jiaxin

CEI No: R25157621

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA License: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
